testcase.name: Phase 11 — Accessibility › auth: labels, roles, keyboard, axe

property.name: defect-candidate
property.value: Email input may lack a visible focus indicator

testcase.name: Phase 11 — Accessibility › authenticated: headings, modal escape, axe

property.name: defect-candidate
property.value: Delete confirmation modal does not close on Escape; closed via Cancel instead

testcase.name: Phase 9 — Responsive UI › auth + workspace layout at current viewport
Phase 10 — Hebrew RTL › RTL direction, alignment, mixed content, no raw i18n keys on auth

property.value: Email input may lack a visible focus indicator

property.name: note
property.value: On ≤767px, .server-status-text is CSS-hidden; only the status dot remains (index.css)
